stimulus: South Korean American sculptor Ji-Hye Park uses recycled steel wire to build delicate, life-sized portraits of working people. Her sculpture of activist Grace ______blank is installed in the Detroit Institute of Arts.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is punctuation use between a subject and a verb. No punctuation is needed when, as in this case, a subject (“Her sculpture of activist Grace Lee”) is immediately followed by a main verb (“is installed”).

Choice A is incorrect because no punctuation is needed between the subject and the verb. Choice B is incorrect because no punctuation is needed between the subject and the verb. Choice D is incorrect because no punctuation is needed between the subject and the verb.
